feed.title: the0cp
feed.subtitle: Jigsaw falling into place. So there is nothing to explain.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 4&#58 Bytecode and Chunk

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 4&#58 Bytecode and Chunk

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. This part will define set of instructions and build Chunks in VM.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 3&#58 Lexical Analysis and Keywords

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 3&#58 Lexical Analysis and Keywords

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. It's time for us to turn to the front-end if the interpreter, transforming raw source code into the executable instructions.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 2&#58 The Value System

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 2&#58 The Value System

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. The value system is the foundational part to implement a dynamically typed languange.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 1&#58 Introduction and Architecture

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 1&#58 Introduction and Architecture

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. The first part is the introduction of the project and overall architecture of the interpreter.

entry.title: Teach AI to Code Better - A Guide to Sanity and Productivity

link.title: Teach AI to Code Better - A Guide to Sanity and Productivity

entry.summary: This guide provides a comprehensive framework for developers to effectively manage AI programming assistants like Claude, transforming them from unpredictable "chaos agents" to brilliant coding wizards. The key to success lies not in the AI itself, but in the user's approach.
